title: ReviewReport
description:
A complete review report for a spec.

Contains the results of all checks (structural and optionally agent-quality),
along with summary counts and metadata for persistence.

checks.description: All check results in execution order.

run_id.description:
Unique run identifier (timestamp-based, set by `save_review()`).
`None` for unsaved in-memory reports; always `Some` after persistence.

skipped.description: Number of checks that were skipped (not applicable).

spec.description: Spec slug this review was generated for.

details.description: Optional detailed evidence (e.g. list of uncovered REQ-IDs).

kind.description: Whether this is a structural or agent-quality check.

message.description: Human-readable summary of the check result.

passed.description: Whether the check passed (always true when `skipped` is true).

skipped.description:
Whether the check was skipped (not applicable for this spec type).
When true, `passed` is also true and the result should not count
against the failure tally.

ReviewCheckKind.description:
The kind of review check: structural (machine-checkable) or
agent quality (LLM-evaluated).
